commands.review_summary:
The PR removes the Matrix crypto bootstrap `runCommand` and `nodeExecutable` injection parameters and updates focused tests to exercise the fixed `process.execPath` command path.

PR surface: Source -10, Tests -3. Total -13 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main exposes `runCommand` and `nodeExecutable` parameters and uses them to build the Matrix native crypto bootstrap command. I did not run a packaged Matrix bootstrap live.

target.title: fix(matrix): use fixed crypto bootstrap command
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

The Matrix plugin's packaged crypto bootstrap surfaced as suspicious in ClawHub because the source exposed an injectable Node executable / command-runner path around the native Matrix crypto dependency repair command.

## Why This Change Was Made

The runtime only needs to run the package-local `download-lib.js` with the current Node executable. This removes the test-only command and executable injection seam from production code while keeping the same fixed argv, cwd, timeout, bounded output, retry, and incomplete-binding cleanup behavior.

Per maintainer direction, this PR no longer bumps the Matrix plugin package version or shrinkwrap root metadata. It now carries the source hardening only, with zero dependency-file changes relative to `origin/main`.

## User Impact

Matrix users keep the same automatic native crypto runtime repair behavior. Future Matrix package artifacts built from this source will no longer expose the injectable bootstrap command path that triggered the scanner concern; publishing a new immutable ClawHub package artifact can happen in the normal follow-up release flow.

## Evidence

```sh
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/matrix/src/matrix/deps.test.ts
node scripts/generate-npm-shrinkwrap.mjs --package-dir extensions/matrix --check
git diff --check origin/main...HEAD
pnpm check:docs
pnpm deps:changes:report -- --base-ref origin/main --markdown /tmp/dependency-changes-97181-after-revert.md --json /tmp/dependency-changes-97181-after-revert.json
pnpm install && pnpm exec oxfmt --check extensions/matrix/src/matrix/deps.ts extensions/matrix/src/matrix/deps.test.ts
```

Dependency report after reverting release metadata:

```text
Changed dependency files: 0
Added resolved packages: 0
Removed resolved packages: 0
Changed resolved package versions: 0
```
target.author: patrick-erichsen
